metadata.thoughts:
**Extracting strike data**

The text mentions service will be guaranteed until 8:30 and from 17 to 20, indicating an upcoming strike. So, I need to set isStrike to true. I have to extract strike dates in the 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' format, but the year isn't specified. It refers to "Venerdì 20 giugno," and based on today's date of March 9, 2026, I should probably use a plausible year. The strike is a 24-hour national strike starting June 20 at 00:00.
